mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id AS taskId, username, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdTime, updated_at AS updatedTime FROM tasks WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET username = #{username}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, name = #{registName}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tasks WHERE id = #{taskId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS taskId, username, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdTime, updated_at AS updatedTime FROM tasks WHERE id = #{taskId} AND username = #{username}
